description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The facade features large, floor-to-ceiling windows on the ground floor and horizontal strip windows on the upper level, allowing for ample natural light. The exterior is finished in a combination of dark and light materials, with the front and one side in a dark color and the other sides in a light tone. A driveway leads to a covered garage on the left side, and a van is parked in front, with a landscaped strip of greenery bordering the driveway. The rear of the house has expansive glass doors and windows, suggesting open-plan living spaces inside. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on geometric simplicity.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of dark and light exterior finishes. Features a driveway, garage, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, driveway, garage, and a van parked in front.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the contrast between dark and light exterior finishes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying expansive glass doors and windows, and a glimpse of interior furnishings.
description_view_3: Right side view with the main entrance, garage, and van visible, emphasizing the building's rectangular form.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and horizontal strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a large glass door, no steps, and a minimalist overhang; integrated with the driveway and garage.
